{{Quote|Alph! Why so tense? I mean sure, fun is fun—but you know how dead slaves push up our ''overhead.''<nowiki></nowiki>|A guard at the City of Bone|<ref name="LXIX" />}}
'''Alph''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] guard at the [[City of Bone]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] camp on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]], where he was sometimes admonished for brutally beating hapless slaves. He [[Death/Legends|perished]] when the [[City/Legends|city]] was destroyed by a chain reaction started by the destruction of [[Shrike Squadron (Mandalore)|Shrike Squadron]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].<ref name="LXIX" />
